title: Invalid Scopes error when connecting Facebook Leads Ads
symptom: When attempting to connect the Facebook Leads Ads account, an error message appears stating 'Invalid Scopes: pages_manage_metadata'. This prevents the connection from being established.
not_this_if: The app has the required permissions configured correctly
root_cause: The error occurs because the Facebook app does not have the necessary permissions enabled for the scopes required by the Leads Ads integration. Specifically, the 'pages_manage_metadata' permission must be allowed in the app settings.
fix_steps: Go to the Facebook Developers portal
Navigate to your app's use cases
Click on the customize button for 'Capture & manage ad leads with marketing API'
agent_instruction: Enable the 'pages_manage_metadata' permission in your Facebook app settings.
